name: paper-source
description: Paper Source finds, ranks, parses, stages, and hands off paper evidence for Paper Wiki-compatible vaults.

interface.shortDescription: v0.2.5 | Paper Source: find, parse, stage, hand off, and record.
interface.longDescription: Paper Source is the source/evidence layer for PaperFlow: configure profile-driven discovery, acquire PDFs or manual-download records, parse with MinerU, preserve source bundles, produce Chinese approval reports, hand off via wiki-ingest-brief.json, and record final wiki ingest. Paper Wiki or another wiki-capable agent owns formal page writing.
defaultPrompt: Set up Paper Source / PS configuration.
Use Paper Source / PS to find, rank, and stage high-quality papers.
Prepare selected papers for Paper Wiki handoff and record wiki ingest.
